content.en:
"During this period of time, you will stay at the headquarters of Xuanyu Pavilion, don't leave!"

Xuanhuang Daozu admonished.

Of course, he himself will not leave.

After all, once the Eightfold Origin Ancestor fights and runs around, if it is affected, even if he is the peak of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, he will not be able to bear it!

As the Dao Ancestor of the Hanhai District Realm, he naturally didn't want the Eightfold Origin Ancestor competition to spread too much this time, otherwise many Community Realms would be destroyed, and the loss would be too great for the Hanhai District Realm.

"Cultivate honestly, with my current strength, I can't participate in the competition of the Holy Dao Monument!"

When Ye Tian thought about it, he calmed down and practiced quietly at the headquarters of Xuanyu Pavilion.

At the same time, Ye Tian's other copied bodies were also perfecting and upgrading those top-notch Yuan Dao control techniques.

After all, with his current Dacheng-level Endless Yuan Dao, it is naturally very simple to create a Small Perfection-level Yuan Dao Control Technique, and there is even hope to create a Great Perfection-level Yuan Dao Control Technique.

"First upgrade the top Yuan Dao control techniques such as the Endless Golden Spear, in this way, my strength will skyrocket again, and it should be easy to kill the ordinary Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

Outside the realm of the Holy Dao Monument.

A group of Yae Origin Ancestors finally can't wait, and there are Yae Origin Ancestors who are about to make a move!

Rumble!!!

The three Eightfold Origin Ancestors shot directly, they were all strong in the later stage of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, but what they comprehended was the Eightfold Yuan Dao.

At this time, they sacrificed an original ancient treasure and tried to take the Holy Dao Tablet.

Every time the Holy Dao Monument was born, there were forces that tried to do so, and they tried to refine the original ancient treasure that restrained the Holy Dao Monument.

If it is successful, then it can directly seal the Holy Dao Monument and take it away.

Of course, each time it failed.

And this time is no exception.

Click!!!

The void of the silent Black Sea cracks!

The Holy Dao Monument was enraged and shot directly!

In an instant, the primordial ancient treasures sacrificed by the three eightfold ancestors were shattered.

"Failed, retreat!"

The three Eightfold Ancestors reacted quickly and immediately retreated.

They are not those eightfold ancestors who have comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, so in fact, their combat power may not be as good as some powerful Eightfold Origin Ancestors who have comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao.

"Let's take action too, the Holy Dao Monument has already been provoked, if it doesn't make a move, it will escape!" said the Holy Ape Dao Ancestor.

In an instant, he turned into a terrifying silver-white giant ape, as if he could swallow the boundary of the community, and with a wave of his hand, he could explode the infinite territory.

He is a special kind of life, and this is what he is!

In addition, he comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and his cultivation had also reached the mid-stage realm of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, so his combat power was very terrifying, which was much more powerful than the three Dao Ancestors just now.

"Shoot!"

"Shoot!"

"Shoot!"

One Dao Ancestor made a move, and they didn't try to smash the Holy Dao Monument at first, they all wanted to subdue it intact.

However, one Dao Ancestor after another made a move, but they all failed.

Eventually, they gave up.

"Directly bombard this Holy Dao Monument!"

The Holy Ape Dao Ancestor decided.

Of course, after killing the Holy Dao Monument, whether its body can be snatched intact or not will also have to compete with other Eightfold Ancestors.

Bang!!!!

The battle really broke out!

However, as an incomparably powerful primordial artifact, the Holy Dao Monument is naturally not weak, although it has no wisdom, but instinctively senses the danger of death, so it directly burns the origin to fight, and its combat power instantly soars to a level beyond the peak.

"Kill!"

An eightfold ancestor made an all-out attack and fought with the Holy Dao Monument in this silent Black Sea region.

Soon.

A nearby community boundary was directly hit by an attack, and it was instantly turned into ashes, and countless weak lives living in it were instantly destroyed.

This is the price of weakness! Helpless and helpless!

Soon, a corner of the Holy Dao Monument crumbled.

The Holy Ape Dao Ancestor grabbed it with his big hand and grabbed a corner of the fragment, which was considered a small gain.

As time passed, the Holy Dao Monument cracked.

In this case, if you want to capture the body of the Holy Dao Monument completely, it is impossible, you can only take as many fragments of it as possible.

Abrupt.

The Holy Dao Monument burned out the last of its origins and launched a terrifying attack, and a ray of light shot out from its body, directly shattering an area.

And the three Eightfold Origin Ancestors did not dodge, and were directly shattered by the Dao body.

Among them, the weaker one of the Eightfold Origin Ancestors had a slightly worse ability to save their lives, and was directly killed in seconds, while the other two Eightfold Origin Ancestors survived by relying on many life-saving means.

But after they barely condensed their bodies, they immediately fled.

They have been hit hard, but they don't dare to stay here, otherwise there is also a danger of falling.

For them, this time the loss was too great!

But no matter how big the loss is, you have to save your life!

After this blow, the Holy Dao Monument was completely shattered.

Next, there was a battle between many Eightfold Ancestors, fighting to snatch the fragments of the Holy Dao Monument.

And these Eightfold Ancestors continued to flee, gradually fighting in the territory around the boundary of the Hanhai District, and suddenly many community boundaries were affected.

Of course.

Some Yae Ancestors are more benevolent and will deliberately avoid the community boundary, but some Yae Origin Ancestors are unreasonable and don't care about destroying the community boundary at all.

Therefore, in this battle, many community boundaries were destroyed, and their heavy losses even exceeded the last Black Silence Daozu incident.

However, hundreds of thousands of small areas in the Hanhai District Boundary, even if hundreds or thousands were destroyed, it was bearable for the Hanhai District Boundary.

And after endless years, a new community will still be born.

Therefore, it is impossible for the high-level leaders of the Hanhai District Boundary to fight hard with the Eightfold Ancestor for the sake of these community boundaries.

......

Xuanyu Pavilion headquarters.

Although Ye Tian didn't go out, he also knew that the battle in the outside world was very fierce, and even once, the two Eight Origin Ancestors came to the vicinity in battle, but the aftermath was resisted by the formation of the Xuanyu Pavilion headquarters.

"This time, the Hanhai District Boundary has suffered heavy losses, which is an opportunity for the Dao Ancestors, but for the creatures under the Dao Ancestors, this time is an unimaginable disaster!"

Ye Tian secretly sighed.

It's a pity that with his strength, he can't do anything.

After a while, the Hanhai District Boundary returned to calm, and it was obvious that the matter of fighting for the Holy Dao Monument had passed.

And Ye Tian inquired and knew about the loss of the Hanhai District boundary this time.

This time, a total of more than 180 community boundaries were completely annihilated, and more than 300 community boundaries were damaged.

And there is a top big force whose headquarters have been hit hard, and a giant city like Xinggu Giant City has been shattered by the aftermath, and it will take some time to repair.

So, he can't go back yet.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of Native Domain days passed.

The Star Ancient Giant City was restored, and Ye Tian also came to the Xuanyu Pavilion branch of the Star Ancient Giant City again.
